title: hydrocharis cordifolia
intro: Hydrocharis cordifolia, also known as the frog-bit, is an aquatic plant that belongs to the family Hydrocharitaceae. Traditionally, the plant has been used in herbal medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Hydrocharis cordifolia include reducing fever, alleviating rheumatic pain, and treating digestive issues. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used to make teas, infusions, and decoctions, as well as being incorporated into traditional Chinese medicine formulas.
